title: CVE-2005-1476 — CVSS 5.1 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2005-1476

CVSS Score: 5.1 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2005-05-09T04:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

Firefox 1.0.3 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary Javascript in other domains by using an IFRAME and causing the browser to navigate to a previous javascript: URL, which can lead to arbitrary code execution when combined with CVE-2005-1477.

References: ftp://ftp.sco.com/pub/updates/OpenServer/SCOSA-2005.49/SCOSA-2005.49.txt, http://greyhatsecurity.org/firefox.htm, http://greyhatsecurity.org/vulntests/ffrc.htm
